# Dynamic feedback loops in recommender systems

**Authors:** Yildiz Zoralioglu, Emre Yalcin  
**Year:** 2026  
**URL:** https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10844-026-01025-y  
**Evidence type:** Empirical evaluation with dynamic feedback-loop framework

## Claim supported

Iterative feedback can magnify popularity bias, reduce diversity, and misalign systems over time.

## Key result

Dynamic feedback loops progressively reinforce popularity bias and reduce diversity/personalization across groups.

## How it supports manufactured traction

This source strengthens the argument that digital systems can be moved by manipulated proxy signals. Use it as evidence for the mechanism, not as proof that every campaign succeeds.
